productDisplayName: Puma Men Navy Blue  Drifter Cat Flip flops
description: Walk through your everyday casual hours in perfect comfort in this pair of Drifter cat slippers from puma. With an ergonomically curved and padded footbed, and a grippy outsole, stay safe and comfortable on all kinds of smooth surfaces. Upper Wide synthetic leather straps with a toe separator and inner lining in twill tape Ergonomically padded footbed for all day comfort puma branding on the forefoot and heel Outsole TPR outsole with diagonal grooves for absolute grip and traction Slipper Care Wipe surface with a clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
